Package dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime

package dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime
Provides the concrete implementation of the machine's runtime environment and instruction execution engine.

This package implements the "Fetch-Decode-Execute" cycle. It consists of:

  • ConcreteExecutionContext: The concrete implementation of the virtual hardware, managing physical storage for registers and the logic for the flags.
  • Executor: The orchestration engine that iterates through a compiled program, manages the Programme Counter, and delegates opcode handling to the instruction set.
Execution Cycle: The Executor maintains a tight loop that persists until the ExecutionContext signals a HALT or the Program Counter exceeds the bounds of the code segment.
Since:
1.0.0
Author:
TiJ
See Also:
  • IExecutionContext
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.api
    Defines the core interfaces for the Registermaschine's execution environment.
  • Class
    Description
    ConcreteExecutionContext
    Default implementation of IExecutionContext used by the runtime system of the Registermaschine.
    ExecutionSnapshot
    Immutable snapshot of an IExecutionContext at a specific moment in time.
    Executor
    The Executor is responsible for executing a compiled program on the Registermaschine runtime environment.
